parameters.content:
Ataraxia group scheduling workflow.

Webhook payload expected from backend:
{
  "sessionId": "uuid",
  "userId": "uuid",
  "aliasAnonimo": "Luna",
  "email": "optional@example.com",
  "phone": "+502...",
  "modalidad": "grupal",
  "joinMode": "scheduled",
  "scheduledAt": "2026-07-05T20:00:00.000Z",
  "timezone": "America/Guatemala",
  "roomId": "group:general"
}

To finish setup: open the Google Calendar node and connect the Google credential/calendar.

nodes.name: Create Google Calendar Event
nodes.notes: Connect the Google Calendar OAuth credential here. Calendar defaults to primary.
